q.en: What problem is the kingdom facing at the beginning of the story?
q.zh: 故事开头，王国面临着什么问题？

options.en: The king has lost his crown
options.zh: 国王弄丢了他的王冠

options.en: The land is growing barren and dying, the creek is polluted, and the citizens are unhappy and tired
options.zh: 土地越来越贫瘠、濒死，小溪被污染，百姓又累又不快乐

options.en: There is not enough rain to grow any food according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 雨水太少，种不出任何食物（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: The kingdom is being invaded by an enemy army
options.zh: 王国正被敌军入侵

explain.en: The king says the kingdom 'grows barren and dies more and more each day,' the creek is 'murky and polluted,' and the people are 'unhappy and too busy.'
explain.zh: 国王说王国「一天比一天贫瘠、濒死」，小溪「又浑又脏」，百姓「不快乐、太忙碌」。

q.en: What reward does the king offer to the person who solves the problem of the decaying land?
q.zh: 国王许诺给解决土地退化问题的人什么奖赏？

options.en: A year of free food from the market according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一年免费从市场领取食物（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: A bag of gold and a horse
options.zh: 一袋金币和一匹马

options.en: To become the next king or queen
options.zh: 成为下一任国王或王后

options.en: The royal position of Official Land Steward, and they may live in the castle for life
options.zh: 「皇家土地管家」的头衔，并且可以终生住在城堡里

explain.en: The king tells the magistrate he will award the 'royal position of Official Land Steward' to whoever solves the problem, and 'that person will be allowed to live in the castle for the rest of his or her days.'
explain.zh: 国王告诉大臣，他会把「皇家土地管家」的职位授予解决问题的人，「此人可以终生住在城堡里」。

q.en: What is Ricardo's plan, the first of the three R's?
q.zh: 三个R中的第一个——里卡多(Ricardo)的计划是什么？

options.en: Replant: plant a new tree for every one that is cut down according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 重种：每砍一棵树就种一棵新的（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Reuse: turn old jars into vases and flower pots
options.zh: 再利用(Reuse)：把旧罐子变成花瓶和花盆

options.en: Reduce: live with only what he needs, and sell or give away anything he doesn't use
options.zh: 减少(Reduce)：只留需要的，把不用的卖掉或送人

options.en: Recycle: melt cans to make new cans
options.zh: 回收(Recycle)：熔化易拉罐做成新罐子

explain.en: Ricardo's plan is 'Reduce' — because his mountain home is far from stores, 'he had to get by with only the things he needed' and would sell or give away anything he didn't use.
explain.zh: 里卡多的计划是「减少(Reduce)」——因为家住山上离商店远，他「只能靠需要的少量东西过活」，不用的就卖掉或送人。

q.en: How does Roger reuse a single jam jar in his 'Reuse' plan?
q.zh: 在「再利用(Reuse)」计划里，罗杰(Roger)把一个果酱罐重复利用了几次？

options.en: He uses it only once and then buries it
options.zh: 他只用一次就埋掉

options.en: After the jam, he uses it to store beans, then as a vase for flowers, then cleans and refills it with jam
options.zh: 吃完果酱后，用来装豆子，再当花瓶插花，洗完又装满果酱

options.en: He throws it away and buys a new one each time according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他每次都扔掉，再买新的（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: He paints it and hangs it on the wall as art
options.zh: 他把它涂色，挂墙上当装饰

explain.en: The book gives the example: after finishing a jar of jam, Roger 'used it to store beans,' then 'as a vase for flowers,' then cleaned and refilled it with more jam — one item used in many ways.
explain.zh: 书里举例：吃完果酱后，罗杰「用它装豆子」，再「当花瓶插花」，洗完又「装满新果酱」——一件东西用了好几种方式。

q.en: The book describes Roger as 'creative and frugal.' What does being frugal mean in the story?
q.zh: 书里形容罗杰「有创意又 frugal（节俭）」。在故事里，frugal 是什么意思？

options.en: Careful with money and things, and not wasting anything
options.zh: 对钱和物品很爱惜，什么都不浪费

options.en: Lazy and unwilling to work
options.zh: 懒惰、不愿干活

options.en: Very rich and able to buy anything according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 很有钱，什么都能买（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Someone who travels a lot
options.zh: 经常旅行的人

explain.en: The text says Roger was 'creative and frugal' and 'No item entered his home without being reused... his goal... was to not waste anything,' so frugal means careful and avoiding waste.
explain.zh: 书里说罗杰「有创意又节俭」，而且「家里的东西没有一样不被重复使用……他的目标是绝不浪费」，所以 frugal 指爱惜、不浪费。

q.en: According to the book, how does Randy's 'Recycle' machine turn old cans into new ones?
q.zh: 书里说，兰迪(Randy)的「回收(Recycle)」机器怎样把旧罐子变成新罐子？

options.en: A machine melts the cans, pours the melted metal, and shapes it into new cans
options.zh: 机器把罐子熔化，倒入液态金属，再塑形成新罐子

options.en: He stacks them into a sculpture
options.zh: 他把罐子堆成一座雕塑

options.en: He washes the cans and paints them a new color according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他把罐子洗干净、重新涂色（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He buries them and plants trees on top
options.zh: 他把罐子埋起来，在上面种树

explain.en: Randy 'had a machine that melted cans, poured the melted metal, and shaped it into new cans,' and he also had 'a simple hand process for remaking paper.'
explain.zh: 兰迪「有一台机器把罐子熔化，倒入液态金属，再塑成新罐子」，还有「手工再造纸张的方法」。

q.en: After the king and queen try all three plans at the same time, what improvements are seen?
q.zh: 国王和王后同时试行三个计划后，看到了哪些改善？

options.en: Forests regrow, water runs clearer, animals get healthier, and people feel more ownership and happiness
options.zh: 森林重新生长、水变清澈、动物更健康，人们更有参与感也更快乐

options.en: The kingdom wins a war against its enemies according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 王国打赢了对敌国的战争（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: The castle is rebuilt bigger and taller
options.zh: 城堡被重建得更大更高

options.en: Everyone moves to a new country
options.zh: 所有人都搬到了另一个国家

explain.en: The book says 'the forests started to regrow, and the water cleaned itself out and ran clearer. The animals became healthier,' and people 'felt more ownership' and enjoyed working together.
explain.zh: 书里说「森林开始重新生长，水自己变清、流得更澈。动物更健康了」，人们「更有参与感」，也乐于一起努力。

q.en: Why does the queen suggest trying all three plans at the same time?
q.zh: 王后为什么建议同时试行三个计划？

options.en: Because the king ordered her to pick only one
options.zh: 因为国王命令她只能选一个

options.en: Because she liked Ricardo the best and wanted to reward him according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 因为她最喜欢里卡多，想奖励他（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Because each plan had benefits, and they would accept the one that showed the best results
options.zh: 因为每个计划都有好处，他们要保留效果最好的那个

options.en: Because the plans were too hard to understand
options.zh: 因为这些计划太难懂了

explain.en: The queen says, 'Let's try all three at the same time... The one that shows the best results will be accepted as the plan to save our kingdom,' since each man's plan had benefits.
explain.zh: 王后说：「我们三个一起试……效果最好的那个，就定为拯救王国的方案」，因为每个人的计划都有好处。

q.en: What is the main message, or the author's purpose, of The Three-R Plan?
q.zh: 《三R计划》的主要寓意（即作者的目的）是什么？

options.en: To explain how kings and queens are chosen according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 解释国王和王后是怎么选出来的（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: To describe a war between three brothers
options.zh: 描写三兄弟之间的一场战争

options.en: To teach readers how to build a castle
options.zh: 教读者怎样建城堡

options.en: To show that reducing, reusing, and recycling can save the land and make a community happier
options.zh: 说明「减少、再利用、回收」能拯救土地，让整个社群更幸福

explain.en: The book is a fable whose 'Three-R Plan' — reduce, reuse, and recycle — restores the land and makes citizens happy, teaching readers to care for the environment.
explain.zh: 这是一则寓言，它的「三R计划」——reduce、reuse、recycle——让土地复原、百姓快乐，教读者爱护环境。

q.en: When the king and queen invite the three men to live in the castle, what do the men do?
q.zh: 当国王和王后邀请三人在城堡里住下时，三人怎么回应？

options.en: All three move into the castle immediately according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 三人立刻都搬进了城堡（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: None of them accept — they already consider themselves stewards of the land
options.zh: 谁都没接受——他们本来就把自己看作土地的管理者

options.en: They ask to be made kings instead
options.zh: 他们要求改封自己为国王

options.en: Only Ricardo accepts the offer
options.zh: 只有里卡多接受了

explain.en: The book says 'None of the men accepted the royal offer. The men already considered themselves stewards of the land and were pleased that the rest of the kingdom did, too.'
explain.zh: 书里写「三人谁都没接受这份王室的邀请。他们本就把自己看作土地的管理者，也很高兴王国其他人也这么想」。

prompt.en: The three men each lived by one of the R's — reduce, reuse, recycle — long before the kingdom needed help. Think about your own life. Which of the three R's do you already practice, and which could you try? Describe one real thing you could reduce, reuse, or recycle this week, and why it would help your home or community.
prompt.zh: 三个男人早在王国需要帮助之前，就各自践行着三R之一——减少、再利用、回收。想想你自己的生活。这三个R里你已经在做哪一个，又可以尝试哪一个？描述这周你能切实做到的一件「减少／再利用／回收」的事，并说明它能怎样帮助你的家或社区。

en: Ricardo 'reduce[d] his load' by keeping only what he needed and giving away the rest (p. 7).
Roger 'reused' a jam jar as a bean jar, then a vase, then refilled it — 'not [to] waste anything' (p. 9-10).
Randy recycled cans and paper so citizens 'wouldn't need to use up the land and other resources' (p. 11).
A good answer names a real action (e.g., reuse a container, recycle paper) and explains its benefit.
zh: 里卡多通过「只留需要的、送走其余」来「减轻负担」（第7页）。
罗杰把果酱罐「再利用」成豆子罐、再当花瓶、又重新装满——「绝不浪费任何东西」（第9-10页）。
兰迪回收罐子和纸张，这样百姓「就不必耗尽土地和其他资源」（第11页）。
好的回答要说出一件真实的事（如重复用容器、回收纸张），并说明好处。
